paymentId.description: The same `paymentId` sent in the request.

refundId.description: Provider's refund identifier. If the operation has failed you **MUST** return `null`.

code.description: Provider's operation/error code to be logged. Return `refund-manually` if you do not support this operation, so we can send a notification to the merchant.

message.description: Provider's operation/error message to be logged.

requestId.description: The same `requestId` sent in the request.
